entities.name: PENNISETUM GLAUCUM
entities.description: A species of millet from which stress inducible promoters were isolated

entities.name: TOBACCO
entities.description: The plant used for functional validation of the isolated promoters

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS ADAPTATION
entities.description: The ability of plants to survive and grow under non-biological stress conditions

entities.name: TOLERANCE
entities.description: The capacity of a plant to withstand adverse environmental conditions

entities.name: GENOME-WALKING METHOD
entities.description: A technique used to isolate the five stress inducible promoters

entities.name: CIS-MOTIF ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method used to identify stress inducible and tissue specific cis-acting elements in promoters

entities.name: PCR
entities.description: Polymerase Chain Reaction used to confirm putative transgenic positive plants

entities.name: PLANT TRANSFORMATION
entities.description: The process of introducing foreign DNA into plants using a vector

entities.name: PGAPX
entities.description: A stress inducible promoter active in drought stress

entities.name: PGDHN
entities.description: A stress inducible promoter active in heat, cold, and drought

entities.name: PGHSC70
entities.description: A stress inducible promoter active in high temperatures

entities.name: PGLEA
entities.description: A stress inducible promoter active in heat and drought

entities.name: PGHSP10
entities.description: A stress inducible promoter active in heat, cold, salt, and drought

entities.name: UIDA
entities.description: A reporter gene fused with the full-length promoters

entities.name: PMDC164
entities.description: A plant transformation vector used to transfer promoters and uidA gene to tobacco

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A condition of water scarcity that causes stress to crops

entities.name: SALINITY
entities.description: High salt concentration in soil causing abiotic stress

entities.name: OXIDATIVE STRESS
entities.description: Stress caused by reactive oxygen species

entities.name: EXTREME TEMPERATURES
entities.description: Very high or very low temperatures causing crop loss

entities.name: HEAT
entities.description: High temperature stress

entities.name: COLD
entities.description: Low temperature stress

entities.name: SALT
entities.description: Saline conditions causing stress

entities.name: STRESS INDUCIBLE PROMOTERS
entities.description: DNA sequences that initiate gene expression in response to specific abiotic stresses

entities.name: TRANSGENIC PLANTS
entities.description: Plants whose genome has been altered by the introduction of foreign DNA

entities.name: CIS-ACTING ELEMENTS
entities.description: Short DNA sequences within a promoter that regulate gene expression

entities.name: CONSTITUTIVE PROMOTERS
entities.description: Promoters that drive gene expression constantly regardless of environmental conditions
